CVE-2023-29827.title: ejs v3.1.9 is vulnerable to server-side template injection. If th ...
CVE-2023-29827.description: ejs v3.1.9 is vulnerable to server-side template injection. If the ejs file is controllable, template injection can be implemented through the configuration settings of the closeDelimiter parameter. NOTE: this is disputed by the vendor because the render function is not intended to be used with untrusted input.

CVE-2024-33883.description: The ejs (aka Embedded JavaScript templates) package before 3.1.10 for Node.js lacks certain pollution protection.
